_doc: Classic Sixth Edition (6ED) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/6ed.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 110C / 110U / 110R / 0M. Collation: US sequential, 10x11 sheets; Belgian striped. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Also known as Classic Sixth Edition. English printings from both USA and Belgium; both are 11C+3U+1R 15-card packs (36/box). No basic lands in boosters. Page does not mention foils in boosters, so foilOdds left null (note: 6ED released ~April 1999, around when foils were introduced in Urza's Legacy, but the page describes no foil slot). Four basic-land art variations. Sold with 60-card tournament packs rather than starter decks.
